title: prostanthera rugosa
intro: Prostanthera rugosa, commonly known as the rose or pink mint bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Prostanthera rugosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and easing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Prostanthera rugosa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
